MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-07-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF FARZENAH AMINI'S MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO COMPLAINT is DENIED without prejudice. It is impossible to determine based on the documents of which judicial notice is requested whether Whitfield Funding LLC was/is suspended at relevant times. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Apr-14-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on Monday, April 14, 2014. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction Is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Nancy Bautista. Not Reported.
